title: Firmware Request for Devices Missing on Github

messages.text: I can see the Heltec e290 (Vision Master) is missing in 1.10.0 also USB serial connection is not working in 1.9.0

messages.author: webbofrays
messages.text: I just got a e213 and flashed the latest firmware on it (1.14.1). The flash went successfully, but the screen is stuck on "LORA MODE 0" and it's not visible via bluetooth (that's the companion I chose). Has anyone had any success with these?
messages.content_html: I just got a e213 and flashed the latest firmware on it (1.14.1). The flash went successfully, but the screen is stuck on "LORA MODE 0" and it's not visible via bluetooth (that's the companion I chose). Has anyone had any success with these?

messages.author: ProtocolXIX 🇬🇧
messages.content_html: need to reboot the device

messages.author: bp-gone
messages.text: The devs decided to no longer build this as supported firmware, citing that the MeshCore UI isn’t very friendly with the e-paper and it just means people report issues that the devs don’t/won’t fix. The old code is still there in the dev branch. So you just need to manually build it. I have the e290 and while this is a PITA, I just build it manually.
messages.content_html: The devs decided to no longer build this as supported firmware, citing that the MeshCore UI isn’t very friendly with the e-paper and it just means people report issues that the devs don’t/won’t fix. The old code is still there in the dev branch. So you just need to manually build it. I have the e290 and while this is a PITA, I just build it manually.
